result.stdout:
Description:
  Updates the secret with the specified name in all repositories of the specified GitHub organization that have this secret to the specified secret value.

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.GitHubSecretUpdater [options]

Options:
  --token <token> (REQUIRED)                                   Personal access token.
  --organizationName <organizationName> (REQUIRED)             Name of the GitHub organization.
  --secretName <secretName> (REQUIRED)                         Name of the secret to be updated.
  --secretValue <secretValue> (REQUIRED)                       Updated value of the secret.
  --updatedRepoNamesLogFilePath <updatedRepoNamesLogFilePath>  Path of log file that will list the names of the updated repositories.
  --version                                                    Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                               Show help and usage information
